content:
MODULE: cosmos.web.cosmosynapse.engine.brain_surgeon
FILE: cosmos/web/cosmosynapse/engine/brain_surgeon.py (372 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: Brain Surgeon — CNS Diagnostic & Recovery Organ
=================================================
The watchdog that monitors all CNS organs, detects failures,
performs hot-swaps, and runs self-healing routines.

Theory:
    - Every organ has a heartbeat. If it stops, the Surgeon intervenes.
    - Or

CLASSES:
- OrganHealth: Health record for a single CNS organ.
  Methods: def age_seconds(self) -> float
- SurgeryReport: Report from a hot-swap or recovery procedure.
- BrainSurgeon: The Diagnostic Organ.
Manages temporal context, model health, organ hot-swapping
  Methods: def register_organ(self, name: str, instance, load_time_ms: float=0.0)
  Methods: def heartbeat(self, organ_name: str)
  Methods: def report_failure(self, organ_name: str, error: str)
  Methods: def diagnose(self) -> dict
  Methods: def get_dead_organs(self) -> list[str]
  Methods: def lobotomy_switch(self, target_lobe: str) -> SurgeryReport
  Methods: def attempt_recovery(self, cns_instance) -> list[SurgeryReport]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
